import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  while i < n and count < 2
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut start = i
      while i < n
        mut bb = 0
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(v)
          bb = v
        when None
          bb = 0
        end
        if is_ws(bb) or bb == 0
          i = n + 1
          i = i
        end
        if i <= n
          if is_ws(bb)
            i = i
          end
        end
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(v2)
          if is_ws(v2)
            i = i
          else
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          i = i
        end
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(v3)
          if is_ws(v3)
            i = n
          end
        when None
          i = n
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        if count == 0
          nums = [x, 0]
        else
          nums = [nums[0], x]
        end
        count = count + 1
      when None
        count = count
      end
    end
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
end
